source_write_key.label: Source Write Key
source_write_key.description: The **Write Key** of a Segment source.

sendIdentify.title: Send Identify
sendIdentify.description: Send an identify call to Segment’s tracking API. This is used to tie your users to their actions and record traits about them.

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user in your database. A userId or an anonymousId is required.

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: A pseudo-unique substitute for a User ID, for cases when you don’t have an absolutely unique identifier. A userId or an anonymousId is required.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message itself took place as a ISO-8601 format date string. Defaults to current time if not provided.

application.label: Application
application.description: Dictionary of information about the current application.

campaign_parameters.label: Campaign Parameters
campaign_parameters.description: Dictionary of information about the campaign that resulted in the API call. This maps directly to the common UTM campaign parameters.

device.label: Device
device.description: Dictionary of information about the device the API call originated from.

adTracking_Enabled.label: Ad Tracking Enabled
adTracking_Enabled.description: Whether or not ad tracking is enabled.

locale.label: Locale
locale.description: Locale string for the current user, for example en-US.

location.label: Location
location.description: Dictionary of information about the user’s current location.

network.label: Network
network.description: Dictionary of information about the current network connection.

bluetooth.label: Bluetooth
bluetooth.description: Whether or not bluetooth is enabled.

cellular.label: Cellular
cellular.description: Whether or not cellular data is enabled.

wifi.label: WiFi
wifi.description: Whether or not WiFi is enabled.

operating_system.label: Operating System
operating_system.description: Dictionary of information about the operating system.

page.label: Page
page.description: Dictionary of information about the current page in the browser.

screen.label: Screen
screen.description: Dictionary of information about the device’s screen.

user_agent.label: User Agent
user_agent.description: User agent of the device the API call originated from.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.description: The user’s timezone as a tz database string, for example America/New_York.

group_id.label: Group ID
group_id.description: The group or account ID a user is associated with.

traits.label: Traits
traits.description: Free-form dictionary of traits that describe the user or group of users.

address.label: Address
address.description: Dictionary of information about the user’s current Address.

sendGroup.description: Send a group call to Segment’s tracking API. This is used to associate an individual user with a group
